Title: A Multidisciplinary Design, Analysis, and Optimization (MDAO) Framework for Conceptual UAV Design
Short Technical Description (<10 words): Automated UAV Design and Optimization Framework
Abstract / Summary / Plan: Developed a multidisciplinary design, analysis, and optimization (MDAO) framework for electric UAV conceptual design. Integrated XFOIL, OpenVSP, FlightStream, and OpenMDAO into a unified workflow supporting conventional, tandem, cruciform, and delta-wing configurations. Implemented direct weight estimation and sensitivity analysis to identify key design variables influencing performance, stability, and structural integrity. Performed gradient-based optimization and validated the final design using RANS simulations in ANSYS Fluent, demonstrating reliable physics-based design decisions and reduced conceptual design time.
Publish Consent: I confirm these project details may be published on the Helicopter and VTOL Laboratory website.
